_comment: preToolUse hook: deny clab_summarize when its `text` arg exceeds 10000 bytes. Per docs (https://docs.github.com/en/copilot/reference/hooks-configuration) only `deny` is currently honored; `allow`/`ask` outputs are accepted but ignored. Emit nothing (empty stdout / exit 0) to let the call through.

preToolUse.bash: INPUT=$(cat); TOOL=$(printf '%s' "$INPUT" | jq -r '.toolName // empty'); if [ "$TOOL" = "clab_summarize" ]; then SIZE=$(printf '%s' "$INPUT" | jq -r '.toolArgs | fromjson? // .' 2>/dev/null | jq -r '.text // ""' | wc -c); if [ "$SIZE" -gt 10000 ]; then printf '{"permissionDecision":"deny","permissionDecisionReason":"clab_summarize input exceeded 10000 bytes (got %s); split the input or summarize sections separately."}' "$SIZE"; fi; fi; exit 0
preToolUse.powershell: $raw = [Console]::In.ReadToEnd(); $evt = $raw | ConvertFrom-Json; if ($evt.toolName -eq 'clab_summarize') { $args = if ($evt.toolArgs -is [string]) { $evt.toolArgs | ConvertFrom-Json } else { $evt.toolArgs }; $size = if ($args.text) { ([System.Text.Encoding]::UTF8.GetByteCount($args.text)) } else { 0 }; if ($size -gt 10000) { $reason = "clab_summarize input exceeded 10000 bytes (got $size); split the input or summarize sections separately."; @{ permissionDecision = 'deny'; permissionDecisionReason = $reason } | ConvertTo-Json -Compress } }; exit 0
preToolUse.comment: Deterministic guardrail in front of clab_summarize. Caps LLM spend by rejecting oversize inputs before the extension's probabilistic body runs.
